scripts.dev:api: bash -lc 'cd apps/server && uv run python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${API_PORT:-8000}'
scripts.test: pnpm test:gui && pnpm test:landing && pnpm test:api
scripts.test:api: bash -lc 'cd apps/server && uv run --extra dev python -m pytest'
scripts.format: pnpm --filter @general-purpose-saas-template/web format && pnpm --filter @general-purpose-saas-template/landing format && bash -lc 'cd apps/server && uv run black app tests'
